notes: RokidBrew 0.2.0 ships the redesigned store, self-update flow, selectable CXR-L host app, install state tracking, and cleaner glasses app management.
changes: Redesigned store UI with richer app detail pages.
Self-update screen with update badge, changelog, download, and install actions.
System log entry when a newer RokidBrew build is available.
Selectable Rokid CXR-L host app support.
Phone and glasses install state tracking with update and uninstall controls.
Refactored CXR-L app upload, query, and uninstall operations.
